summary:
Recovery: Excellent

Reading: The window's open and you've made the call — rest day, and that's the right read to trust even with this morning's green light still on the table. You decided to bank the capacity instead of spending it, and choosing recovery off a strong night is its own kind of discipline, not a day off the wagon. You've already put down a fair bit of background movement, so this isn't a sit-still day — the job now is to protect what you've built: protein's still barely halfway, so make the rest of the evening lean and protein-first, then water and an early night to let it all settle.

Performance: Rest day. You called it, so today's about protein, hydration, and an early night — let the work you've banked settle in instead of spending the green light.

Transit: none
